name: Collection pair bundle settings
title: Collection pair bundle
helpText: Choose a collection and set how the bundle price is applied.
noMarkets: No markets found for this store.
singlePriceNote: Any two products from the collection are sold for this fixed total price in your store currency. Discount is split proportionally by each product's price.
itemCountNote: Enable markets individually. Customers get every pair of eligible products for that market's fixed price. Discount is split proportionally by each product's price.
error: Unable to save bundle settings. Please try again.
